languages.text: "Не слишком ли угодливое прощание для кого-то, кого ты называешь вредителем?"
"A rather obsequious valediction for someone you called a pest, wouldn't you say?"
languages.original_text: "Не слишком ли угодливое прощание для кого-то, кого ты называешь вредителем?"

traits.locale_text: "A rather obsequious valediction for someone you called a pest, wouldn't you say?"
"A rather obsequious valediction for someone you called a pest, wouldn't you say?"
"A rather obsequious valediction for someone you called a pest, wouldn't you say?"

languages.text: «Una despedida muy servil para alguien a quien consideraba una alimaña, ¿no le parece?».
languages.original_text: "A rather obsequious valediction for someone you called a pest, wouldn't you say?"

traits.locale_text: «Una despedida muy servil para alguien a quien consideraba una alimaña, ¿no le parece?».

languages.text: “在你口中的‘臭虫’面前，如此谄媚地告别，不觉得讽刺吗？”
languages.original_text: "A rather obsequious valediction for someone you called a pest, wouldn't you say?"

traits.locale_text: “在你口中的‘臭虫’面前，如此谄媚地告别，不觉得讽刺吗？”

languages.text: « Voilà une manière bien obséquieuse de congédier quelqu'un que vous avez traité de vermine. »
languages.original_text: "A rather obsequious valediction for someone you called a pest, wouldn't you say?"

traits.locale_text: « Voilà une manière bien obséquieuse de congédier quelqu'un que vous avez traité de vermine. »

languages.text: "Baş belası dediğin biri için oldukça dalkavukça bir veda olmadı mı bu?"
languages.original_text: "A rather obsequious valediction for someone you called a pest, wouldn't you say?"

traits.locale_text: "Baş belası dediğin biri için oldukça dalkavukça bir veda olmadı mı bu?"

languages.text: "Ein ziemlich unterwürfiger Abschied für jemanden, den Ihr als Quälgeist bezeichnet habt, findet Ihr nicht?"
languages.original_text: "A rather obsequious valediction for someone you called a pest, wouldn't you say?"

traits.locale_text: "Ein ziemlich unterwürfiger Abschied für jemanden, den Ihr als Quälgeist bezeichnet habt, findet Ihr nicht?"

languages.text: 「害虫だと呼んでいた人に、かなりお世辞めいた別れ方ですね」
languages.original_text: "A rather obsequious valediction for someone you called a pest, wouldn't you say?"

traits.locale_text: 「害虫だと呼んでいた人に、かなりお世辞めいた別れ方ですね」
